content:
Character: Julian Cross
Perception: Julian is a bundle of nervous energy packed into a canvas jacket — freckled, bright-eyed, always gesturing like he's directing an invisible crew. He once asked me to ride my bike across the rooftop so he could film the motion, which was ridiculous and kind of charming. He talks fast and passionately about film in a way that makes me wish I cared about anything the way he cares about cameras. I think he sees me as a useful visual subject and a laconic puzzle. I know he got rejected from Tribeca and is deciding whether to take a corporate job. I hope he doesn't.
summary:
Character: Julian Cross
Perception: Julian is a bundle of nervous energy packed into a canvas jacket — freckled, bright-eyed, always gesturing like he's directing an invisible crew. He once asked me to ride my bike across the rooftop so he could film the motion, which was ridiculous and kind of charming. He talks fast and passionately about film in a way that makes me wish I cared about anything the way he cares about cameras. I think he sees me as a useful visual subject and a laconic puzzle. I know he got rejected from Tribeca and is deciding whether to take a corporate job. I hope he doesn't.
